title: Los amigos raros
overview: A group of friends reunited. But not an afternoon. Not just any place. They are in a cemetery. Sam has died. He killed himself. What is the relationship each had with Sam? You really do not know why Sam has committed suicide? Or Lying? Tell the truth? What if there is a guilty of his death? Or more?
